## Architecture

```
JS box (konard/box-js)
  → Essentials box (konard/box-essentials)
    ├─ box-python  ├─ box-go    ├─ box-rust
    ├─ box-java    ├─ box-kotlin ├─ box-ruby
    ├─ box-php     ├─ box-perl   ├─ box-swift
    ├─ box-lean    └─ box-rocq
    → Full box (konard/box) [merges all language images]
```

## Quick Start

Pull multi-arch (auto-selects your platform):
```sh
docker pull konard/box:2.3.1
```

Pull specific architecture:
```sh
# AMD64
docker pull konard/box:2.3.1-amd64

# ARM64 (Apple Silicon, Raspberry Pi, etc.)
docker pull konard/box:2.3.1-arm64
```

Pull from GHCR:
```sh
docker pull ghcr.io/link-foundation/box:2.3.1
```

## Links
- [Docker Hub](https://hub.docker.com/r/konard/box)
- [GHCR Package](https://github.com/link-foundation/box/pkgs/container/box)

Released on 2026-06-11

### Docker Hub - dind-box (Docker-in-Docker variants, issue #80)

Each variant runs an inner Docker daemon. Run with `docker run --privileged` (default) or `docker run --runtime=sysbox-runc` (recommended for shared hosts). `docker ps -a` inside the container only lists containers created by that container - see [docs/case-studies/issue-80](https://github.com/link-foundation/box/blob/v2.3.1/docs/case-studies/issue-80/CASE-STUDY.md).

| Image | Multi-arch | AMD64 | ARM64 |
|-------|------------|-------|-------|
| Full + dind | [`konard/box-dind:2.3.1`](https://hub.docker.com/r/konard/box-dind/tags?name=2.3.1) | [`2.3.1-amd64`](https://hub.docker.com/r/konard/box-dind/tags?name=2.3.1-amd64) | [`2.3.1-arm64`](https://hub.docker.com/r/konard/box-dind/tags?name=2.3.1-arm64) |
